---
id: create-entry-point-log
title: "Create entry point log"
description: "Reports entry point activity (gates, building doors) back to KISS after a tenant interacts with an entry point NFC reader."
sidebar_label: "Create entry point log"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create entry point log"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/entry-points/{entry_point_id}/logs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reports entry point activity (gates, building doors) back to KISS after a tenant interacts with an entry point NFC reader.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
